title: Marketing Operations Specialist
required_skills: 3+ years experience in marketing operations or content management
Strong writing, editing, and proofreading skills
Knowledge of digital marketing trends and best practices
matched_skills: 3+ years experience in marketing operations or content management
Project management (Agile: Scrum, SAFe) — JIRA, Confluence
Analytical skills — Power BI, KPI dashboards, ROI reporting
Strong communication and collaboration — cross-functional influence, stakeholder management
Campaign execution — GTM strategy, product marketing campaigns
Performance metrics monitoring — KPI reporting, data analysis
missing_skills: Landing page and email content creation
core_responsibilities: Plan, manage, and execute marketing projects across content, campaigns, and digital channels
Create SEO-optimized content including landing pages, CTAs, emails, gated content, and sales collateral
Translate business objectives into compelling written content for targeted audiences
Coordinate with design, sales, and marketing teams to ensure on-time, in-scope delivery
Monitor performance metrics, analyze results, and adjust strategies to maximize impact
recommended_emphasis: Highlight content strategy and campaign execution experience from Moli Media and Intelligent Power Corporation roles
Emphasize project coordination and cross-functional delivery skills from Hapag-Lloyd and HSBC
Showcase sales collateral and product messaging work — argumentation guides, competitive materials, demo scripts
Mention any CMS, email marketing, or digital content tools used even in passing
Add HubSpot or Figma to skills if any familiarity exists; otherwise consider upskilling
Frame marketing experience in terms of campaign operations workflow and content lifecycle management
Quantify content output and campaign results where possible
